title: Hornet Removal in Kips Bay, Manhattan | $350 – $550
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal services in Kips Bay, Manhattan. Safe, effective hornet nest elimination for $350 – $550. Same-day service available. Call now!
intro: Hornets nesting near your Kips Bay residence or business pose a serious safety risk. Best Pest Control NYC provides fast, professional hornet removal services throughout the Kips Bay neighborhood, protecting families and employees from aggressive stinging insects. Our certified technicians safely eliminate hornet nests from high-rise terraces, brownstone eaves, and commercial properties between Third Avenue and the East River.
whyUs: With over 15 years serving Manhattan properties, Best Pest Control NYC understands the unique challenges of hornet infestations in Kips Bay's mix of pre-war buildings, modern residential towers, and street-level businesses. Our technicians use proven removal techniques that ensure complete nest elimination while prioritizing the safety of residents, pets, and passersby in this densely populated neighborhood.
localContext: Kips Bay's tree-lined streets near the NYU Langone Medical Center and abundant green spaces around the Kips Bay Towers make the area attractive to hornets seeking nesting sites. The neighborhood's combination of mid-century apartment complexes, historic townhouses, and ground-floor restaurants creates various sheltered spots where hornets commonly build nests, especially during the warmer months.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Kips Bay?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day hornet removal service in Kips Bay. Upon your call, we'll dispatch a technician within hours for emergency situations. Most hornet nest removals are completed in a single visit lasting 1-2 hours, depending on nest location and size.

faqs.question: What does the $350 – $550 hornet removal price include?
faqs.answer: Our hornet removal service includes a thorough property inspection, complete nest removal, treatment of the affected area to prevent re-nesting, safe disposal of the nest, and a follow-up inspection if needed. The final price depends on nest size, location accessibility, and the height at which the nest is positioned.

faqs.question: Are hornets common in Kips Bay apartment buildings?
faqs.answer: Yes, hornets frequently build nests on balconies, terraces, air conditioning units, and building eaves throughout Kips Bay. The neighborhood's mix of high-rise and low-rise buildings with outdoor spaces provides ideal nesting locations. We regularly service both residential and commercial properties in the area.

faqs.question: Is hornet removal safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our licensed technicians use EPA-approved products and follow strict safety protocols during hornet removal. We'll advise you to keep family members and pets inside during treatment, and the area is typically safe to access within a few hours after service completion.
